lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਰੂਪੁ ਨ ਰੇਖਿਆ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਦੇਖਿਆ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਅਲਖੁ ਲਖਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tis roop na rekhiaa ghatt ghatt dekhiaa guramukh alakh lakhaavaniaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: He has no form or shape; He is seen within each and every heart. The Gurmukh comes to know the unknowable. ||1||Pause||
You are God, Kind and Merciful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਪਰਸਾਦੁ ਕਰੇ ਨਾਮੁ ਦੇਵੈ ਨਾਮੇ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: gur parasaad kare naam devai naame naam samaavaniaa |2|
lines.english: When the Guru showers His Grace upon us, He blesses us with the Naam; through the Naam, we merge in the Naam. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਦੂਜਾ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: tudh bin doojaa avar na koee |
lines.english: Without You, there is no other at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਮਨੁ ਭੀਜੈ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਧਿ ਲਗਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: guramukh naam milai man bheejai sehaj samaadh lagaavaniaa |3|
lines.english: The Gurmukhs obtain the Naam. Their minds are enraptured, and they easily and intuitively enter into Samaadhi. ||3||
Your treasures are overflowing with devotional worship.
You Yourself are the True Creator Lord.
I praise You, O my Beloved.
Night and day, I sing Your Glorious Praises, God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਈ ਜਾਚਾ ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਤੂੰ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: tudh bin avar na koee jaachaa gur parasaadee toon paavaniaa |4|
lines.english: Without You, there is no other for me to seek out. It is only by Guru's Grace that You are found. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਪਣੀ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰਹਿ ਤੂੰ ਲੈਹਿ ਮਿਲਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: apanee kripaa kareh toon laihi milaaee |
lines.english: Bestowing Your Mercy, You merge us into Yourself.
The limits of the Inaccessible and Incomprehensible Lord cannot be found.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰੇ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਸਬਦੁ ਸੇਵਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: poore gur kai sabad dhiaaeeai sabad sev sukh paavaniaa |5|
lines.english: Through the Shabad, the Word of the Perfect Guru, we meditate on the Lord. Serving the Shabad, peace is found. ||5||
Praiseworthy is the tongue which sings the Lord's Glorious Praises.
Praising the Naam, one becomes pleasing to the True One.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਦਾ ਰਹੈ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤੀ ਮਿਲਿ ਸਚੇ ਸੋਭਾ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: guramukh sadaa rahai rang raatee mil sache sobhaa paavaniaa |6|
lines.english: The Gurmukh remains forever imbued with the Lord's Love. Meeting the True Lord, glory is obtained. ||6||
They lose their whole lives in the gamble.
The self-willed manmukhs do their deeds in ego.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਲੋਭੁ ਮਹਾ ਗੁਬਾਰਾ ਫਿਰਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਆਵਣ ਜਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: antar lobh mahaa gubaaraa fir fir aavan jaavaniaa |7|
lines.english: Within is the terrible darkness of greed, and so they come and go in reincarnation, over and over again. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਕਉ ਆਪਿ ਲਿਖਤੁ ਧੁਰਿ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jin kau aap likhat dhur paaee |
lines.english: On those whom He Himself has so pre-destined.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਭਉ ਭੰਜਨੁ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੮॥੧॥੩੪॥
lines.translit: naanak naam milai bhau bhanjan gurasabadee sukh paavaniaa |8|1|34|
lines.english: O Nanak, they receive the Naam, the Name of the Lord, the Destroyer of fear; through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, they find peace. ||8||1||34||
The Creator Himself bestows Glory
The Unseen Lord is within, but He cannot be seen.
Maajh, Fifth Mehl, First House:
He has taken the Jewel of the Naam, the Name of the Lord, and He keeps it well concealed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਮੁ ਅਗੋਚਰੁ ਸਭ ਤੇ ਊਚਾ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਲਖਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: agam agochar sabh te aoochaa gur kai sabad lakhaavaniaa |1|
lines.english: The Inaccessible and Incomprehensible Lord is the highest of all. Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, He is known. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਜੀਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਕਲਿ ਮਹਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਸੁਣਾਵਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: hau vaaree jeeo vaaree kal meh naam sunaavaniaa |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice, my soul is a sacrifice, to those who chant the Naam, in this Dark Age of Kali Yuga.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਸਚੈ ਧਾਰੇ ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sant piaare sachai dhaare vaddabhaagee darasan paavaniaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Beloved Saints were established by the True Lord. By great good fortune, the Blessed Vision of their Darshan is obtained. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਟਿ ਤੇਤੀਸਾ ਖੋਜਹਿ ਤਾ ਕਉ ਗੁਰ ਮਿਲਿ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਗਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: kott teteesaa khojeh taa kau gur mil hiradai gaavaniaa |2|
lines.english: whom the three hundred thirty million demi-gods search for-meeting the Guru, one comes to sing His Praises within the heart. ||2||
upon whom Brahma and Indra meditate within their hearts,
The One who is sought by the Siddhas and the seekers,
Twenty-four hours a day, the wind breathes Your Name.
The earth is Your servant, a slave at Your Feet.
The True Lord and Master is known to the Gurmukhs.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਾਣੀ ਬਾਣੀ ਸਰਬ ਨਿਵਾਸੀ ਸਭਨਾ ਕੈ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: khaanee baanee sarab nivaasee sabhanaa kai man bhaavaniaa |3|
lines.english: In the four sources of creation, and in all speech, You dwell. You are dear to the minds of all. ||3||
In the home of their own beings, they are peacefully and comfortably at ease.
He is realized through the Shabad, the Word of the Perfect Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਪੀਆ ਸੇਈ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਾਸੇ ਸਚੇ ਸਚਿ ਅਘਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: jin peea seee tripataase sache sach aghaavaniaa |4|
lines.english: Those who drink it in are satisfied. Through the Truest of the True, they are fulfilled. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਧਨਵੰਤਾ ਸੋ ਵਡ ਸਾਹਾ ਜੋ ਗੁਰ ਚਰਣੀ ਮਨੁ ਲਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: so dhanavantaa so vadd saahaa jo gur charanee man laavaniaa |5|
lines.english: They are wealthy, and the greatest kings; they center their minds on the Guru's Feet. ||5||
They are blissful, enjoying pleasures, and eternally joyful.
First, You created nourishment;
then, You created the living beings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧੁ ਜੇਵਡੁ ਦਾਤਾ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਲਵੈ ਨ ਕੋਈ ਲਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: tudh jevadd daataa avar na suaamee lavai na koee laavaniaa |6|
lines.english: There is no other Giver as Great as You, O my Lord and Master. None approach or equal You. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਤੂੰ ਤੁਠਾ ਸੋ ਤੁਧੁ ਧਿਆਏ ॥
lines.translit: jis toon tutthaa so tudh dhiaae |
lines.english: Those who are pleasing to You meditate on You.
They practice the Mantra of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਤਰੈ ਸਗਲੇ ਕੁਲ ਤਾਰੇ ਤਿਸੁ ਦਰਗਹ ਠਾਕ ਨ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: aap tarai sagale kul taare tis daragah tthaak na paavaniaa |7|
lines.english: They themselves swim across, and they save all their ancestors and families as well. In the Court of the Lord, they meet with no obstruction. ||7||
